name: Quick Spinach Salad with Sprouts
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim, wash and dry spinach. Tear into bite-sized pieces to make about 10 cups, lightly packed.
2. Place spinach in salad bowl. Add alfalfa sprouts, cheese, and sunflower seeds.
3. In a small measuring cup, bowl, or jar with a screw top, combine oil, lemon juice, water, garlic, mustard, salt, and pepper.
4. Mix well.
